Empires & Puzzles Costumed Director Zuri 5-Star Legendary Holy Yellow from Starfall Circus Family Review

Director Zuri's costume doesn't just give her a red nose; it gives her modern super-stats and a nasty passive that reflects ailments back at her enemies. Discover why this clown is no joke in our comprehensive review.
Costumed Director Zuri Review: The Clown Queen of Chaos
Costumed Director Zuri: The Clown You Can't Laugh At
If you thought the original Director Zuri was good, the

("Master of Clowns") is here to show you what a true 5-star hero looks like in the modern era. Released significantly later than the base version, this costume completely revitalizes the hero, swapping her elegant top hat for a colorful, chaotic clown aesthetic—and bringing stats that are absolutely terrifying. She retains her role as a premiere healer but adds tank-level durability and a passive that punishes enemies for trying to debuff her team.

The costume transforms Zuri from a stern ringmaster into a whimsical, slightly unsettling clown. The vibrant colors—yellows, reds, and blues—pop off the card, and the "Clown's Blessing" theme fits perfectly with her minion-summoning mechanic. While some might prefer the dignified look of the original, there's no denying the "Master of Clowns" looks like she's having way more fun ruining your opponent's day.
The stat jump from base Zuri to Costumed Zuri is astronomical.
1127 (Up from 766) - She hits hard with tiles now.
1384 (Up from 772) - She is nearly twice as durable.
These stats are fully competitive with the latest heroes. 1384 Defense and 2262 Health make her one of the sturdiest healers in the game. She can easily serve as a
in top-tier wars, surviving hits that would have vaporized her base form.

A single cast creates a massive health differential. If she heals 3 allies and summons 5 minions, that's thousands of effective HP added to the board.
Family Bonus, Passives, Aether Power & Unique Abilities
This is where the costume gets really nasty.
family bonus (self-cleanse at end of turn), which is excellent for shaking off silences.
When she cleanses an ailment from herself (via her Special or Family Bonus) or her team, she
reflects a copy of that ailment to a random enemy
The enemy hits your team with Defense Down. Zuri fires. She cleanses the Defense Down from your team AND throws a Defense Down back at a random enemy. It turns the enemy's best weapons against them.
At the start of battle, she gets a defense boost. This makes her even harder to kill in the opening turns, solidifying her role as a viable Tank.

Costumed Zuri is the definition of "Anti-Power Creep." She takes an old hero and catapults them right back to the top of the meta. Her stats are modern, her passives are disruptive, and her healing is unmatched.
She is one of the best Yellow healers in the game. She is viable in every single game mode: War Defense (Tank/Flank), Offense, Titans (high tile damage), and Events.
There is absolutely no reason to use the base version if you have the costume,

you specifically need the Sorcerer class talent (Delay) over the Cleric talent (Manashield). However, the Manashield (Chance to resist mana effects) is generally considered superior for a healer anyway.
The Costume is an upgrade in every measurable way: Stats, Class, Skill percentages, and Passive utility.
With her massive stats, you have flexibility, but Defense/Health is still king for healers.
Makes her nearly unkillable. Her minions get huge HP.
Increases Minion Attack and Tile Damage.
. She is a healer. Her job is to survive and keep everyone else alive.
Manashield protects her from Mana Control (like Hansel or Hel), ensuring she can fire.

In a "Very Fast" rush meta, she can sometimes be too slow if you don't have the right troops.

An excellent Tank or Flank. The passive reflection can disrupt attacking teams unexpectedly.
In Rush wars, she charges in 6 tiles and becomes an absolute nightmare to deal with.
Her minions ensure your team finishes stages with full HP.
Attackers often bring Defense Down to kill the tank. Zuri cleanses it and throws it back, potentially ruining their combo.
Good luck killing anything. Zuri heals, Ludwig taunts/manas, MN revives.
Heroes who steal minions or buffs can be annoying.
Heroes who block passives prevent her reflection mechanic.
If you get this costume, max it immediately. She will be your main healer for years. She effectively functions as two heroes: a healer and a minion summoner.

Costumed Zuri is worth the tonics and the Limit Break mats (even Alphas). Her stats ensure she won't be obsolete anytime soon, and her passive mechanic is unique enough to always have a niche. She pairs exceptionally well with modern "Construct" or "Goblin" heroes who care about stats and survivability.
Post-release polls showed an overwhelming "Yes" for "Is she worth summoning?" and "Is she OP?".
"She’s actually really strong... Cleanse is so important at the moment due to all the DoT floating around." -
The community universally agrees this is one of the best "Glow Ups" for a hero. Going from 800 power to 1200+ power is exactly what older heroes need.

Costumed Director Zuri is not just a fresh coat of paint; she's a complete renovation. She takes a beloved classic hero and outfits her with a nuclear-powered engine. Whether you hate clowns or love them, you'll want this one on your side. She heals, she shields, she reflects, and she laughs while doing it.
The new Queen of Yellow Healers. A must-have, must-level, must-limit-break hero.

The Director is back with a new wardrobe and terrifying new power. Our in-depth review of Costumed Director Zuri covers her massive stat boost, reflection mechanics, and why she is arguably the best Holy healer in the game.
